commands.name: init
commands.description: Init numan (run this the first time you start using numan)

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds and tracks a new NuGet package in a local source

commands.name: update
commands.description: Checks for new package versions and adds them if needed.

commands.name: list-sources
commands.description: List saved NuGet sources that numan keeps track of

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists installed NuGet packages with their latest versions

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove or delete packages from the local NuGet source

commands.name: set-default
commands.description: Change the default NuGet source (if multiple sources exist)
